titleZh: 董事勤勉义务的司法审查：美国与中国比较
titleEn: Judicial Review of Directors' Duty of Care: A Comparison Between U.S. & China
abstractZh: 通过比较法视角梳理中国与美国董事勤勉义务审查标准差异，讨论中国公司法上过错门槛的制度含义。
abstractEn: A comparative study of care standard design in director liability regimes, with practical implications for Chinese interpretation and future standard-setting.
